name: knowledge_fetch
description: Fetch a documentation URL (wiki, official docs, README, etc.) and store it in the project knowledge base for future reference.

project_path.description: Workspace-relative project path (e.g. workspace/myproject). Defaults to workspace root.

label.description: Human-readable label for this source (e.g. 'Python pathlib docs')

name: knowledge_search
description: Search the project knowledge base for documentation relevant to a query. Returns the top matching chunks.

query.description: Search query (e.g. 'how to read a file asynchronously')

project_path.description: Workspace-relative project path to search within

top_k.description: Number of top chunks to return (default 5)

name: knowledge_list
description: List all knowledge sources indexed for a project.

name: knowledge_remove
description: Remove a knowledge source and its chunks from the project knowledge base.

source_id.description: ID of the knowledge source to remove
